TM TimeMaxx Productivity app by Jacob Chin
Overview Support Privacy Terms
Support

Support and FAQ

Help for TimeMaxx, including contact details, bug reporting guidance, and common questions.

Last updated: March 18, 2026

Support

If you need help with TimeMaxx, have a question about the app, or want to report a bug, email jacobchin.builds@gmail.com.

Bug reports

To help diagnose issues quickly, include the app version, device model, iOS version, steps to reproduce, what you expected to happen, and what actually happened.

  • App version
  • Device model
  • iOS version
  • Steps to reproduce
  • What you expected to happen
  • What actually happened

FAQ

How do I get help? Send a short description of the issue or question to jacobchin.builds@gmail.com.

How do I report a bug? Email support with the app version, device model, iOS version, steps to reproduce, what you expected, and what happened instead.

Does TimeMaxx require an account? No. TimeMaxx does not require sign-in or account creation in the current version.

Where is my data stored? TimeMaxx is local-first. Timeline data and settings are stored on your device in the current version.

Need something else? Email jacobchin.builds@gmail.com.
